summary: South Bay startups raised nearly $4 billion over the past six weeks, with Nexthop AI and MatX each landing $500M Series B rounds in Santa Clara and Mountain View respectively. Ayar Labs (San Jose) closed a $500M Series E, while Rhoda AI (Palo Alto) pulled in $450M Series A funding. Most of the region's tech workforce remains stable, though seven companies are actively hiring as venture capital continues flowing into AI, semiconductors, and robotics.
